summary: Iteration 177: Full E2E Order Flow testing complete. 13/13 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend tests passed. Complete role-by-role order flow verified across Customer, Admin, and Vendor roles.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!, Vendor: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full E2E order flow verified. Key findings: (1) HP LaserJet Pro M404dn Printer (id: 69d3aa541f2d0a62eb3d1f6f) is visible in marketplace with price=1,250,000 TZS, 2 variants (Standard at 1,250,000, Network+ at 1,350,000), supply_mode=In Stock, lead_time=3 days, (2) Product detail page shows full info with breadcrumb, variants, Add to Cart button, vendor_id NOT exposed, (3) Customer checkout-quote creates quote successfully with pending status, (4) Customer orders page shows orders with timeline, payment status, fulfillment status, (5) Admin orders-ops shows 138 orders with customer info, payer info, sales assignment, (6) Vendor orders endpoint returns assigned orders with base_price (vendor cost), timeline, sales contact, (7) Admin vendor supply submissions shows pending/approved/rejected submissions, (8) Idempotent approval verified - no duplicate products created, (9) Business settings public endpoint returns company data.
